flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Drake University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($45.9k → $52.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Drake University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($45.9k → $52.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Drake University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9k → 2.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Drake University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
